project.name: CS470 Coding Assignment #3
project.goal: Pacman capture-the-flag 토너먼트 승률 극대화 / 상위 랭킹

techStack: Python 3.9 (uv venv), numpy, pandas. No other deps. No multithreading.
build: uv venv --python 3.9 .venv && uv pip install --python .venv/bin/python numpy pandas
conventions: All Python via .venv/bin/python. Never global python/pip. Log AI usage to docs/AI_USAGE.md on every submission-file edit.
structure: minicontest/ (game engine + editable agent files), icml2021_style/ (LaTeX report template), docs/ (AI usage log + project notes), .omc/ (session state/plans/memory)
grading: 40pt code (winrate vs baseline.py: 51%+ = full) + 60pt report (LaTeX ICML: intro 8 / methods 20 / results 20 / conclusion 12) + 30pt extra tournament ranking (top5=30, 6-10=20, 11-15=15, 16-20=10, 21-25=5)
error_policy: error rate <=10% no penalty, 10-30% decayed, >30% score=0. Must guarantee robust no-exception agents.
time_limits: 15s init / 1s per move / 1200 moves per game / no multithreading
submission: ZIP '20200492.zip' containing 20200492.py, 20200492.pdf, 20200492.pptx. Rename your_best.py -> 20200492.py before submit.
